response: TEXT: THE FRAME OF THE BIKE HAS A BASE WEIGHT OF W KILOGRAMS. EACH ADVANCED COMPONENT ADDED TO THE FRAME REDUCES THE WEIGHT BY 2%. IF ALEX ADDS N ADVANCED COMPONENTS, THE FINAL WEIGHT OF THE FRAME, W_F, IS EQUAL TO W MINUS 2% OF W MINUS N TIMES 2%. THE MINIMUM NUMBER OF ADVANCED COMPONENTS, N, ALEX SHOULD ADD TO THE BIKE TO MEET THE DESIRED ENERGY EXPENDITURE REDUCTION IS 5. THE ENERGY REDUCTION, E, IS MODELLED BY THE FUNCTION E(N) = 1 - (1 - 0.02)^N. THE MINIMUM N IS 5. THE WORD CLOCK APPEARS AT LEAST 3 TIMES. THE WORD CLOCK APPEARS AT LEAST 3 TIMES.
